creator: netchild@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John R from comment #2)
Can you please provide the info for:
 - tar -tvf your-piwigo.pkg| grep pwgsession.class.php
 - tar -tvf your-piwigo.pkg| wc -l

The FreeBSD port itself has the missing file, so something looks not OK with your local package build. Any non-standard options?
